An announcement from Teaminvest Private Group Ltd ( (AU:TIP) ) is now available.

Teaminvest Private Group Ltd has disclosed a change in director Andrew Joseph Coleman’s shareholding, reflecting participation in the company’s dividend reinvestment plan. Coleman acquired 13,015 fully paid ordinary shares at $1.6814 per share on 27 March 2026, increasing his direct holding from 1,411,829 to 1,424,844 shares.

The new shares were issued under Teaminvest Private Group’s dividend reinvestment plan linked to the dividend announced on 9 February 2026, indicating continued board-level confidence in the company’s equity. The transaction represents a modest but incremental increase in insider ownership, which may be viewed positively by investors monitoring director alignment with shareholder interests.

data.title: ISB Corporation Issues Restricted Stock to Align Management Pay With Shareholder Value
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ISB CORP (Japan) ( (JP:9702) ) just unveiled an update.

ISB Corporation has approved the issuance of 15,356 new shares of common stock as restricted stock remuneration to six directors and nine executive officers, with a total value of ¥31,571,936 and a payment date set for April 27, 2026. The shares will be allocated through monetary compensation claims converted in kind, at an issue price of ¥2,056 per share, matching the prior day’s Tokyo Stock Exchange closing price to ensure alignment with market value and avoid preferential treatment.

The move is part of a restricted share-based remuneration plan first introduced in 2020 to incentivize eligible directors and executive officers to enhance long-term corporate value and strengthen alignment with shareholders. By tying a portion of management compensation to company stock under restricted conditions, ISB aims to reinforce value sharing with investors and support sustained performance and governance objectives without materially advantaging insiders over the broader market.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9702) stock is a Hold with a Yen2232.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ISB CORP (Japan) stock, see the JP:9702 Stock Forecast page.

More about ISB CORP (Japan)

ISB Corporation is a Japan-based company listed under securities code 9702, operating in the information services and systems sector. The company focuses on providing technology-driven solutions and corporate services, with a governance structure that includes a board of directors, executive officers, and audit and supervisory committee members as part of its management and oversight framework.

Average Trading Volume: 44,115

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Summerset Group Holdings Limited ( (DE:20S) ) has issued an update.

Harbour Asset Management Limited has increased its substantial shareholding in Summerset Group Holdings, lifting its stake from 7.551% to 8.597% of the retirement village operator’s ordinary shares. The move reflects continued institutional interest in Summerset, with Harbour’s position now representing 20,984,507 shares out of 244,092,099 on issue.

The change in holding results from a series of on-market buy and sell trades since May 2025, including gross purchase consideration of more than $75 million across Harbour and its subsidiary BNZ Investment Services. The higher stake consolidates Harbour’s role as a key institutional shareholder, potentially giving it greater influence over governance matters and signalling confidence in Summerset’s long-term prospects to the market.

More about Summerset Group Holdings Limited

Summerset Group Holdings Limited is a New Zealand-based retirement village operator focused on providing aged care and independent living options. The company develops, owns, and manages retirement villages and care facilities, targeting the growing demand for senior living solutions in the New Zealand market.

data.title: Tribeca Global Natural Resources posts indicative late-March NTA update
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. ( (AU:TGF) ) has shared an announcement.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. has released an indicative estimate of its net tangible asset backing per ordinary share as at 27 March 2026, reporting a pre-tax NTA of $3.29 and a post-tax NTA of $3.00 on an ex-dividend basis. The figures are calculated over 73,693,826 shares on issue and are net of all fees and expenses.

The company stressed that these NTA numbers are based primarily on previously reported monthly data and estimated performance of listed equity holdings, while private credit and other unlisted investments are not revalued weekly and will only be fully reflected in the official monthly NTA statement. As a result, the release offers investors a provisional snapshot rather than a complete view of portfolio performance, underscoring the inherent estimation risk and the need to await month-end audited figures for a more definitive assessment.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:TGF) stock is a Hold with a A$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. stock, see the AU:TGF Stock Forecast page.

More about Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. is an Australia-listed investment company focused on global natural resources, investing across equities, private credit and other unlisted assets in the resources sector. Its portfolio is managed by Tribeca Global Resources Pty Ltd, part of Tribeca Investment Partners, with a strategy that blends listed securities and alternative assets for diversified exposure.

Bendigo & Adelaide Bank ( (AU:BEN) ) just unveiled an update.

Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Limited has applied for quotation on the ASX of 11,799,036 new fully paid ordinary shares under its dividend or distribution plan, with an issue date of March 31, 2026. data.title: ISDN chairman Tan Soon Liang to retire in 2026 as board plans new independent director
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from ISDN Holdings Limited ( (SG:I07) ) is now available.

ISDN Holdings has announced that independent non-executive director and board chairman Tan Soon Liang will retire at the conclusion of its annual general meeting in April 2026, in line with Singapore Exchange rules that limit the tenure of independent directors to nine years. Tan, who joined the board in 2016, will also step down from the audit, remuneration and risk management committees, and has stated he has no disagreements with the board.

To fill the vacancy, the board plans to appoint Lim Teck Chai, Danny as an independent non-executive director, subject to shareholder approval at the 2026 AGM. If approved, Lim will join the audit, remuneration and risk management committees, ensuring continuity in the company’s governance structure and compliance with evolving independence requirements for directors.

More about ISDN Holdings Limited

ISDN Holdings Limited is a Singapore-incorporated company listed in both Hong Kong and Singapore. The group operates through multiple subsidiaries, with its board structure governed by the listing rules of the Singapore Exchange and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, and it maintains key committees including audit, remuneration and risk management to oversee corporate governance.

See more insights into I07 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Huscoke Told It Lacks Viable Business as Hong Kong Listing Review Upholds Delisting Decision
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Huscoke Holdings Limited ( (HK:0704) ).

Huscoke Holdings Limited has announced that the Listing Review Committee of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange has upheld an earlier decision that the company no longer meets the exchange’s requirements for maintaining a viable and sustainable business. The committee cited the group’s minimal revenue and extremely thin profit margin from its coke trading operation, the prolonged suspension of its coke production business despite a major asset acquisition, and the lack of concrete plans, funding, or additional income streams as key reasons.

The review body also questioned the feasibility of Huscoke’s proposed arrangements to restart production, including a preliminary framework agreement that requires a substantial upfront payment the company has not shown it can finance. With limited cash, no clear fundraising plan, and heavy reliance on an unresolved legal claim to support future obligations, the committee concluded that Huscoke lacks sufficient assets and operational substance, leading to the decision and the suspension of trading in its shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0704) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Huscoke Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:0704 Stock Forecast page.

More about Huscoke Holdings Limited

Huscoke Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company engaged in the coke business, primarily focused on coke production and coke trading. Since suspending its coke production operations in October 2021, the group’s activities have been limited to a small-scale coke trading business, leaving its acquired furnaces, which represent the majority of its assets, idle and non-revenue generating.

Average Trading Volume: 1,287,557

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$115M
